notes: Routine sync-shadcn status should stay concise; this file can include settled forks and rejected upstream surfaces.
For non-synced visual rows, add screenshots.suggestion and screenshots.shadcn when evidence exists.

features.label: Header
features.summary: Shared header follows shadcn structure while keeping Plate-owned product choices.

items.title: Shared header parity
items.decision: Use shadcn header structure, omit Home because the Plate logo owns it, remove MCP from the header, keep Discord, and hardcode GitHub stars to 16k.
items.upstream: Shadcn desktop header with search trigger, GitHub, Discord, language, theme, and separators.
items.suggestion: Plate header keeps Docs, Editors, Templates, search trigger, GitHub 16k, Discord, language, and theme.

features.label: Home Page
features.summary: Home page adopted shadcn layout polish without replacing the Plate editor preview or product copy.

items.title: Hero and preview layout
items.decision: Use centered shadcn-style PageHeader, muted announcement, single docs CTA, and full-bleed muted preview area; keep Plate preview content and remove duplicate GitHub CTA.
items.upstream: Shadcn home uses centered hero, muted product band, and compact CTA rhythm.
items.suggestion: Plate keeps editor preview and Pro/Potion path with shadcn spacing/background polish.

features.label: Editors vs Blocks
features.summary: Plate /editors uses shadcn /blocks framing and toolbar polish while preserving Plate demos.

items.title: Page shell and vertical rhythm
items.decision: Use shadcn /blocks page shell style without BlocksNav categories, Browse CTAs, or v0 actions.
items.upstream: Shadcn /blocks has centered PageHeader, section-soft content band, category nav, and block gallery actions.
items.suggestion: Plate /editors keeps editor demos as the product and excludes category nav and browse CTAs.

items.title: BlockViewer toolbar
items.decision: Use upstream device/open/refresh group order and command-pill rhythm, excluding Open in v0.
items.upstream: Shadcn BlockViewer toolbar has device controls, open/refresh controls, separated install command, and v0 action.
items.suggestion: Plate keeps install/source behavior, Pro/Get the code behavior, and no v0 button.

items.title: Preview frame polish
items.decision: Use shadcn radial dotted background, soft backing layer, overflow-hidden rounded frame, and handle breakpoint.
items.upstream: Shadcn /blocks preview frame has dotted background and resizable shell polish.
items.suggestion: Plate keeps iframe/source/install/editor behavior inside the polished frame.

features.label: Releases vs Changelog
features.summary: Plate /docs/releases uses shadcn changelog page structure with Plate release data.

items.title: Releases page parity
items.decision: Use RSS action, latest-five inline releases, More Updates grid, and page anchors; keep the Plate title and release source.
items.upstream: Shadcn /docs/changelog has RSS action and More Updates layout.
items.suggestion: Plate /docs/releases keeps Plate release data, RSS feed, and docs shell.

features.label: Docs Sidebar
features.summary: Plate keeps the current sidebar as an intentional fork.

items.title: Accordion sidebar
items.decision: Keep current Plate behavior as an intentional fork. No merge work now.
items.upstream: Shadcn sidebar is simpler because its docs tree is smaller.
items.suggestion: Plate needs accordion grouping for dense docs, plugins, components, examples, migrations, and API pages.

features.label: Command Menu
features.summary: Command input styling, performance, footer shortcuts, and copy payload policy are settled.

items.title: Header search input
items.decision: Use the shadcn-style compact command trigger in the header.
items.upstream: Shadcn search trigger is compact and borderless.
items.suggestion: Plate search trigger matches that visual shape.

items.title: Footer shortcuts and copy payloads
items.decision: Plate limits command-menu copy payloads to registry-backed editor/plugin kits, components, and examples; Sync applies code before marking the row synced.
items.upstream: Shadcn can show Enter plus copy shortcuts for copyable command items.
items.suggestion: Plate should limit copy payloads to editor kits, plugin kits, components, and examples after the registry review.

features.label: Registry
features.summary: Registry shape, copy payloads, and source loading are deferred as one product review.

items.title: Lazy source loading
items.decision: Keep lazy /api/registry-source/[name] for bandwidth; do not pull shadcn eager code-source behavior without a registry decision.
items.upstream: Shadcn registry pages can load source/code through its block/component viewer model.
items.suggestion: Plate uses lazy internal source hydration to avoid heavy payloads.

items.title: Full registry review
items.decision: Review components, plugin kits, editor kits, examples, install commands, and public route shape together.
items.upstream: Shadcn registry behavior is the base compatibility target.
items.suggestion: Plate registry content and API MDX are product-owned and should not be merged piecemeal.

features.label: Create
features.summary: Defer upstream /create review; future Plate create work is a separate product decision.

items.title: Upstream /create product surface
items.decision: Defer upstream /create and v0-oriented create flow review until Plate has a product-shaped /create decision.
items.upstream: Shadcn /create is tied to its own product flow and generated style/theme registry.
items.suggestion: Plate may have a /create later, but it should be designed for Plate rather than copied now.

features.label: Themes and Styles
features.summary: Defer upstream Rhea/style/theme/generated style registry review with the create/theming product surface.

items.title: Rhea/style/theme generated registry
items.decision: Defer this with upstream create/theming instead of treating it as a final exclusion.
items.upstream: Shadcn has generated style registry files for themed examples.
items.suggestion: Plate does not want the old theme/customizer direction or upstream Rhea theme surface.

features.label: Preview Routes
features.summary: Plate keeps a single preview route while the registry/style system stays deferred.

items.title: Shadcn style-param /view route
items.decision: Do not copy shadcn /view/[style]/[name] and legacy theme wrapper for now.
items.upstream: Shadcn iframes use /view/[style]/[name] for style-aware block previews.
items.suggestion: Plate uses /view/[name] for registry previews and has no active multi-style preview surface.

features.label: Docs Engine
features.summary: Plate keeps the docs shell, source loader, and search wiring as product-owned forks.

items.title: Docs shell ownership
items.decision: Keep Plate docs shell as an intentional fork. It owns CN fallback, registry fallback pages, Plate LLM markdown, custom pager behavior, and no-v0 policy.
items.upstream: Shadcn renders docs from one route file with Fumadocs neighbours, copy page, TOC, and Open in v0 CTA.
items.suggestion: Track future shadcn page-shell changes as small visual/layout rows, not as a route rewrite.

items.title: Source and search wiring
items.decision: Keep Plate i18n source loader and grouped search route.
items.upstream: Shadcn uses a simple /docs source loader and default Fumadocs createFromSource search route.
items.suggestion: Plate source/search wiring exists for CN docs and command/search result quality, so do not chase upstream simplicity here.

features.label: MDX and Code Primitives
features.summary: Stable MDX/code infrastructure differences that were missed by route-focused sync reviews.

items.title: MDX component primitives
items.decision: Keep Plate's MDX map as an intentional fork for now; before changing it, sweep shadcn docs usage and decide which upstream primitives Plate can actually use.
items.upstream: Shadcn MDX components include explicit heading anchors, DirectoryList, Kbd, Callout, CodeCollapsibleWrapper, package-manager command blocks, and component-list helpers.
items.suggestion: Sweep all shadcn docs for upstream MDX primitive usage, then pull useful upstream primitives while preserving Plate API and registry MDX vocabulary.

items.title: Codeblock collapsible wrapper
items.decision: Plate CodeBlockWrapper uses upstream expand/collapse behavior while preserving Plate full, open, and expandButtonTitle support.
items.upstream: Shadcn CodeCollapsibleWrapper has a top-right Expand/Collapse control, separator, bottom gradient trigger, content-visibility:auto, and cleaner figure handling.
items.suggestion: Synced: upstream top-right control, separator, bottom gradient trigger, content-visibility, and figure/pre cleanup are implemented with Plate props preserved.

items.title: Code command yarn tab
items.decision: Plate command blocks generate and render yarn variants alongside pnpm, npm, and bun.
items.upstream: Shadcn command blocks generate and render bun, npm, pnpm, and yarn variants.
items.suggestion: Synced: rehype command props, MDX command tabs, config persistence, and copy helpers all include yarn.

items.title: Highlight code cache
items.decision: Plate highlightCode uses upstream-style SHA-256 keyed LRU caching while preserving registry file highlighting.
items.upstream: Shadcn caches Shiki output with a SHA-256 key and one-hour LRU cache.
items.suggestion: Synced: Plate caches highlighted HTML in highlightCode and keeps highlightFiles for registry/source previews.

items.title: Copy button fallback
items.decision: Plate copy helpers use upstream-style clipboard fallback and success-gated copied state while preserving analytics and dropdown copy helpers.
items.upstream: Shadcn copy waits for clipboard success and falls back to a hidden textarea for older or restricted browsers.
items.suggestion: Synced: copy helpers fall back to a hidden textarea, track events only after a successful copy, and only show copied state on success.

features.label: Docs Actions
features.summary: Plate keeps shadcn action-button structure but owns the action menu destinations.

items.title: Docs copy page menu
items.decision: Keep Plate Markdown, ChatGPT, Claude, and GitHub actions; continue excluding v0.
items.upstream: Shadcn copy page menu includes Markdown, v0, ChatGPT, Claude, and Scira.
items.suggestion: Keep the Plate menu. Do not add v0 or Scira unless product policy changes.

features.label: API Docs
features.summary: Keep Plate custom MDX/API docs support; it is product-owned, not shadcn-owned.

items.title: Custom API MDX
items.decision: Keep Plate's generated API docs vocabulary and MDX support.
items.upstream: Shadcn docs do not own Plate API reference generation.
items.suggestion: Plate API pages are a core docs surface and must stay.
